eight: noun. NATO & ICAO radiotelephony clear code (spelling-alphabet name) for the digit 8.
eighteen: numeral. The cardinal number occurring after seventeen and before nineteen, represented in Roman numerals as XVIII and in Arabic numerals
eng: symbol. ISO 639-2 & ISO 639-3 language code for English.
gee: interjection. A general exclamation of surprise or frustration.
gen: symbol. Former ISO 639-3 language code for Geman Deng.
gene: noun. A theoretical unit of heredity of living organisms which may take several values and (in principle) predetermines a precise trait of
genet: noun. Any of several Old World nocturnal, carnivorous mammals, of the genus Genetta, most of which have a spotted coat and a long, ringed
genie: noun. A jinn, a being descended from the jann, normally invisible to the human eye, but who may also appear in animal or human form.
ghee: noun. A type of clarified butter used in South Asian cooking.
gie: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Guébie.
git: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Gitxsan.
hen: noun. A female chicken (Gallus gallus), especially a sexually mature one kept for her eggs.
hent: verb. To take hold of, to grasp.
hin: symbol. ISO 639-2 & ISO 639-3 language code for Hindi.
hinge: noun. A jointed or flexible device that allows the pivoting of a door etc.
hit: symbol. ISO 639-2 & ISO 639-3 language code for Hittite.
nee: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Kumak.
neigh: noun. The cry of a horse.
net: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Nete.
night: noun. The time when the Sun is below the horizon when the sky is dark.
nit: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Southeastern Kolami.
nth: adjective. Occurring at position n in a sequence.
tee: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Huehuetla Tepehua.
teeing: verb. present participle and gerund of tee
teen: noun. Synonym of teenager: a person between 13 and 19 years old (inclusive).
teg: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Teke-Tege.
ten: noun. NATO, ICAO, ITU & IMO radiotelephony code for 10, used only with o'clock to indicate direction.
the: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Chitwania Tharu.
thee: pronoun. Objective and reflexive case of thou.
theine: noun. Caffeine when present in tea.
thin: adjective. Having little thickness or extent from one surface to its opposite.
thine: determiner. Second-person singular prevocalic possessive determiner (preconsonantal form: thy).
thing: noun. That which is considered to exist as a separate entity, object, quality or concept.
